import React,{useState}from'react';import'./CaseManagement.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const CaseManagement=_ref=>{let{language}=_ref;const[filter,setFilter]=useState('all');const content={en:{title:'Case Management',filterAll:'All',filterHarassment:'Harassment',filterRagging:'Ragging',filterCyber:'Cyberbullying',caseId:'Case ID',type:'Type',severity:'Severity',status:'Status',date:'Date'},hi:{title:'मामला प्रबंधन',filterAll:'सभी',filterHarassment:'उत्पीड़न',filterRagging:'रैगिंग',filterCyber:'साइबरबुलिंग',caseId:'मामला आईडी',type:'प्रकार',severity:'गंभीरता',status:'स्थिति',date:'तारीख'}};const text=content[language]||content.en;// Mock cases
const cases=[{id:'SAH-CASE-001',type:'Harassment',severity:'high',status:'Under Review',date:'2026-03-01'},{id:'SAH-CASE-002',type:'Ragging',severity:'medium',status:'Resolved',date:'2026-02-28'},{id:'SAH-CASE-003',type:'Cyberbullying',severity:'low',status:'Under Review',date:'2026-02-27'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"case-management",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"case-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:text.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"filter-buttons",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:filter==='all'?'active':'',onClick:()=>setFilter('all'),children:text.filterAll}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:filter==='harassment'?'active':'',onClick:()=>setFilter('harassment'),children:text.filterHarassment}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:filter==='ragging'?'active':'',onClick:()=>setFilter('ragging'),children:text.filterRagging}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:filter==='cyber'?'active':'',onClick:()=>setFilter('cyber'),children:text.filterCyber})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"case-table",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"table-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:text.caseId}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:text.type}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:text.severity}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:text.status}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:text.date})]}),cases.map(c=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"table-row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:c.id}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:c.type}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"severity-badge ".concat(c.severity),children:c.severity})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:c.status}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:c.date})]},c.id))]})]})});};export default CaseManagement;
